pages.title: about
pages.text: Hi, I’m Yunxiong (Sean) Mindset Dislike short vids stream, be focused Live in reality, be real Read more know less, be humble Learn from sharing, be brave Thanks~ 💪

/* 字体设置 */ :root { --base-font-family: 'LXGWWenKai-Light'; --page-content-max-width: 950px; } @font-face { font-family: 'LXGWWenKai-Light'; src: url('../font/LXGWWenKai-Light.ttf') format('truetype'); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; } .keep-markdown-body { font-size: 1.35rem; } /* 隐藏主题开发者信息 */ .theme-info.info-item.default { display: none; } /* 隐藏post的作者信息 */ .post-page-container .post-content-container .post-content-bottom .post-header { display: none; } @media (max-width: 800px) { .post-page-container .post-content-container .post-content-bottom .post-header { display: none; } }
